_comment: Reference WD demonstrating inputForNextRun end-to-end with a mixed script + human loop. Step 1 (`echo-previous`) is a Python script that reads /output/previous_run.json and summarizes what the prior run passed through. Step 2 (`set-next`) is a human params task — the operator types a message that becomes the next run's previousRun.message. Docker required for the script step. See docs/PREVIOUS_RUN.md.
name: previous-run-example
title: Previous Run Outputs Example
description: Round-trips a message between runs: script reads `previousRun.message`, human sets next one.

steps.name: Set message for next run
steps.description: Type a message in the form below. The next run of this workflow will see it as `previousRun.message`.

params.name: message
params.description: Message to pass to the next run.
